operational_knowledge_units.title: Training deck is organized into three content sections
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The contents slide shows the training material is structured into three sections: Overview, Geek+ RMS, and Aveva.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Contents slide for OptiSweep training deck lists three sections: Overview, Geek+ RMS, and Aveva. This is deck structure context, not an action procedure.
